name: RESTOR: PK/PD mTORi Inhibition in Older Adults
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov recruiting early phase 1 randomized double-masked exploratory PK/PD trial of rapamycin and everolimus in healthy adults aged 65 to 90, focused on blood, adipose, and muscle drug levels, mTOR signaling, inflammatory markers, and dose timing with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
authors: The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio
